final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original educational infographic card explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs from Three Kingdoms for children.

Style/medium: flat vector illustration, cartoon storybook style, educational infographic for children aged 6-10, clear and friendly visual language
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, title area at top, main story illustration occupying 60% of card, bullet points arranged neatly beside or below the illustration
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story, simplified narrative showing key moments like fire attack, chained ships, and strategic victory, characters depicted in approachable cartoon style
Scene/backdrop: simplified river battle scene with stylized boats and flames, clean background that doesn't distract from educational content
Lighting/mood: bright and cheerful daytime atmosphere, inviting and educational mood suitable for young learners
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, balanced with neutral card background for readability
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: all text must be clearly legible with proper punctuation; layout must work as a single self-contained knowledge card; visual hierarchy must guide children from title to illustration to key points
Avoid: realistic violence or gore; overly complex historical details; cluttered composition; dark or scary imagery; small unreadable text
